metadata.description: video-taste: Anti-slop AI video generation skill for professional-grade cinematic prompts. Applies directorial prompt structure (Beat Sheet + six-layer system) to Kling, Sora, Wan2.1, and Seedance.

plugins.name: video-taste
plugins.description: Anti-slop AI video generation skill. Applies Video Read inference and three dials (DRAMA / MOTION / FIDELITY) before writing any image or video prompt. Uses Beat Sheet structure and six-layer directorial prompting to stop Claude from defaulting to generic AI-looking output. Use whenever generating cinematic video prompts for Kling, Sora, Wan2.1, or Seedance.
